mapper.sql: room_id, item_title, anchor_name, image_url, start_price, step_price, current_price, leader_user_id, leader_nickname, registration_required, deposit_amount, ends_at, status, version
mapper.select: select from auction_room order by ends_at asc
select from auction_room where room_id = #{roomId} for update
mapper.insert: insert into auction_room ( room_id, item_title, anchor_name, image_url, start_price, step_price, current_price, leader_user_id, leader_nickname, registration_required, deposit_amount, ends_at, status, version ) values ( #{roomId}, #{itemTitle}, #{anchorName}, #{imageUrl}, #{startPrice}, #{stepPrice}, #{currentPrice}, #{leaderUserId}, #{leaderNickname}, #{registrationRequired}, #{depositAmount}, #{endsAt}, #{status}, #{version} )
